extraction.one_line_summary: JUNGELS Bob attacked solo after La Redoute summit, exploited wait-and-see hesitation among favorites, held 20+ seconds to win
tactical_patterns: GILBERT attacked first meters of La Redoute creating chaos that enabled teammate JUNGELS' later winning move.
Quickstep three-pronged attack (GILBERT early, JUNGELS summit, ALAPHILIPPE marking) paralyzed favorites into inaction during decisive 40km finale.
JUNGELS exploited post-summit descent of La Redoute when rivals hesitated, gap grew rather than closed in final kilometers.

rider_signals.JUNGELS Bob: positive: all-rounder transformed Giro young rider classification form into Monument-winning capability on Ardennes climbs
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: dropped in opening meters of La Redoute despite being pre-race favorite, revealed declining explosive power
rider_signals.GILBERT Philippe: positive: tactical sacrifice attack shredded group for teammate despite being potential winner himself
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: positive: marked all dangerous moves for fourth place, showing Quickstep had multiple protected cards
rider_signals.WOODS Michael: positive: Canadian climber's late attack for second proves WorldTour puncheurs can podium Monuments without team support
